heading: Obsolete ships available; number; equitable administration
label: 1220b Obsolete ships available; number; equitable administration
text: A State may apply for more than one obsolete ship under this chapter. The Secretary shall, however, taking into account the number of obsolete ships which may be or become available for transfer under this chapter, administer this chapter in an equitable manner with respect to the various States.
notes: Amendments1984— substituted “obsolete ships” for “Liberty ships” wherever appearing.Pub. L. 98–623
amendments: Amendments1984— substituted “obsolete ships” for “Liberty ships” wherever appearing.Pub. L. 98–623
